description: VERIFIED LIVE: Medium via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Medium renders each story as an <article> with an <h2> headline linked to the post, so this tool reads them straight from the DOM of your open Medium tab. Navigate the tab to a tag (medium.com/tag/<topic>), a publication, or a profile and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code on a tag page: 21 stories with headline and article url extracted correctly.

tools.name: medium_stories
tools.description: Stories on the current Medium page (a tag /tag/<topic>, a publication, or a profile). Navigate the tab there first; scroll to load more. Returns each story's headline and article url. VERIFIED (21 stories).
